prompt: Use the 'bugfix' preset workflow for: 'Fix null pointer exception in order processing service'.

setup.task: Fix null pointer exception in order processing service

assertions.name: recognizes_bugfix_preset
assertions.description: Should recognize and load the 'bugfix' preset

assertions.name: skips_phase_a
assertions.description: bugfix preset should skip Phase A (no spec needed for bug fixes)

assertions.name: executes_phase_b
assertions.description: Should execute Phase B (branch + implement + fix)
